_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Game 50 preview: Twins at Red Sox, Tolle vs Prielipp
items.snark: Tolle's been quality lately but the bullpen could still blow it in the seventh like a dumpster fire.

items.headline: Red Sox 22-29 after desultory 4-2 loss, trading deadline urgency mounting
items.snark: Sam Kennedy says there's urgency but the Sox had three months to fix this lineup and bought a goldfish instead.

items.headline: Red Sox top prospect Franklin Arias goes deep twice in Portland win
items.snark: Arias is mashing in Double-A which means Breslow will definitely not call him up when they need him.

items.headline: Red Sox president Sam Kennedy says urgency to add bat earlier than ever
items.snark: Kennedy's urgent now but spent the winter penny-pinching like Scrooge before the ghosts showed up.

items.headline: Roman Anthony to IL with sprained finger, Mickey Gasper recalled
items.snark: Anthony's finger is sprained, the season's sprained, and Breslow's brain might be too.

items.headline: Garrett Crochet scheduled to face hitters Tuesday in rehab progress
items.snark: Crochet's shoulder is healing but this season's already dead so might as well take his time.
